items.title: Javonte Williams: Backfield untouched by NFL Draft
items.body_text: The Cowboys did not add to the running back position in the 2026 NFL Draft, leaving Williams (shoulder) positioned to reprise a bell cow role, Jon Machota of The Athletic reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Deion Burks: Picked by Colts
items.body_text: The Colts selected Burks in the seventh round of the 2026 NFL Draft, 254th overall. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Garrett Nussmeier: Slide ends in Kansas City
items.body_text: The Chiefs selected Nussmeier in the seventh round of the 2026 NFL Draft, 249th overall. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Jam Miller: Headed to New England
items.body_text: The Patriots selected Miller in the seventh round of the 2026 NFL Draft, 245th overall. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Seth McGowan: Taken by Indianapolis
items.body_text: The Colts selected McGowan in the seventh round of the 2026 NFL Draft, 237th overall. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
